title: MC Cards
body:
**MC Cards**: MC Cards Is A Simple Card Collection Mod Where You Can Find Card Packs And Open Them To Find And Unlock New Cards.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------


**Card's**: There Are 11 Different Rarities Of Cards Some Of Them Include: Common, Uncommon, Rare, Nether, End, And Platinum. _(Theres also a secret rarity)_
 
![All Card Rarity's](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c4c9c21f3d17a8cb6a6609fa368093a488b22a3.png)
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------


**Card Pack's**: Base Card Packs Can Be Crafted From 5 Plastic 1 Leather And 1 String. After Crafting A Base Card Pack (The White One) You Mix A Special Ingredient With It To Craft A Card Pack Of A Specific Rarity _(JEI Is Recommended)_

![Card Pack Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d89dcb5de0e59c010dd25aac2ba3fb7b74543484.png)



![All Packs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d3153a0b64cf56e0e88380603c4ca283a9661f7.png)
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Mega Boxes**: Mega Boxes Can No Longer Be Found But Instead Must Be Crafted!

![Mega Boxes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a60899dec7aa5e4f2cdf921a01806f0ee35eba28.png)
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Display Case's**: Display Cases Can Store And Show Off Your Favorite Cards!
_**Note:**_ _If You Dont Like How The Glass On The Card Stand Looks Click_ _**[Here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mc-cards-clear-stand)**_ _For A Resource Pack That Changes The Texture!_

![Display Cases](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/472f17ba26fa50dc4aed878ea38011758ee33c7c.png)
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Platinum**: Platinum Ore Can Craft Platinum Cards Which Are Cooler Versions Of Cards.

![Platinum Card](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28174bf6b9c76e44e8722332a9567274cd32fbb1.png)
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Check The Full List Of Cards On The New Wiki.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
_Known Issues:_ Sometimes In Creative When Opening Card Packs Too Quickly It Will Change A Card You Recieved
